Settings Reconnect gun bridge (AndroidStation.reconnectGun)
Gun-late connect: faster retry + SDK status sync
Cleanup build — retire native diagnostic status spam
Multi-scan mode (one pull, many tags)
BLE reconnect no longer reloads WebView (save/restore state, singleTask)
Scan panel: live feed, sensitivity presets, Damaged/Broken status with notes
Assets sheet: status_note column + Damaged lifecycle
Screen may now sleep to save power/screen wear
the gun stays connected in the background
Pull the gun trigger to wake the tablet (SDK only, no keyboard/power button) — first pull wakes, next pull scans

Fixes scans not showing on the top strip: the app now sends tags to the screen through a direct, reliable channel instead of the relay that was dropping them - your reads should now appear up top, not just in the bottom text. Removed Hold mode: this gun model does not report when you release the trigger, so Hold could not work
scan modes are now Single and Continuous only (any device set to Hold is moved back to Single automatically).

Settings now apply live the moment you change them (Done just closes the menu) - the app talks to the gun directly instead of through a slower relay. Added an on-screen diagnostic overlay (bottom-left) plus native status messages so we can finally SEE the scan/settings path on the device: it shows whether the station bridge is connected, echoes 'Gun set: ...' when a setting reaches the gun, and prints 'Trigger DOWN/UP' so we can tell why Hold behaves like a toggle. This build is about pinpointing why scans reach the bottom text but not the top strip.

New Hold scan mode: squeeze the trigger to read continuously while held, release to stop (pick it in Settings, alongside Single and Continuous). The repeat-speed slider now applies to both Hold and Continuous. Startup fix: the app now shows a Showrunner Station splash over the whole screen until the station screen is actually ready, so you no longer see the normal phone dashboard for a few seconds first. Note: the device must be signed in as its station account to land on the station screen.

Continuous scan speed is now adjustable (settings slider). Auto-eject timer is a 1/3/5/10-minute dropdown. Gun mode/power/beeper/speed are remembered on the device and pushed to the gun on every start, so the screen and gun always match (fixes booting in machine-gun mode while settings showed Single). App now opens straight into the station screen with a Showrunner Station splash instead of briefly showing the normal phone view.
Fixed the real cause: the gun was in Continuous mode, which did not deliver tags on this reader. Both Single and Continuous now use the reliable read, so the trigger shows the tag again
Tip: Single mode (one pull = one tag) is recommended for badge and equipment scans
Fixed: trigger reads stopped working in the last build (a battery/version check was blocking the scanner) - pull-to-read + beep now work again
Scanner starts at full power so it reads on first run
use the Setup screen to lower the range/sensitivity
Fixed: gun reads now reach the app (they were hitting the wrong browser frame) — scans show in the top strip and enrollment works
New Setup screen: tap CHAINWAY HANDHELD at the top to set scan power/sensitivity, scan mode (single/continuous), gun beeper on/off, and the auto sign-out timer
Trigger now does a SINGLE read (one pull = one tag) instead of continuous machine-gun scanning
Gun echoes 'Read: <EPC>' on the status bar so we can see reads even if the top strip is empty
